notes: Run 124: Task 7 (Proof Utility Critique) — updated CRITIQUE.md with run 123 LowPassFilter2p section, corrected Last Updated header. Task 1 (Research) — identified 4 new targets: NotchFilter::apply (51), SecondOrderReferenceModel forward-Euler (52), WelfordMeanVector (53), PurePursuit lookahead (54). Added to RESEARCH.md and TARGETS.md. 47 files, 690 theorems, 0 sorry. Gap: correspondence tests missing for LowPassFilter2p and BlockIntegralTrap. Paper stale (not updated since run 63).

LowPassFilter2p.notes: Direct Form II biquad IIR Butterworth filter. 13 theorems: passthrough, linearity, zero-state, delay updates, Butterworth symmetry, DC steady state, DC gain=1. Informal spec written run 123. Correspondence test harness NOT YET written.

BlockIntegralTrap.notes: Trapezoidal integrator with symmetric saturation. 16 theorems: saturation bounds, monotonicity, fold invariance, anti-windup boundary. Correspondence test harness NOT YET written.

NotchFilter.notes: Target 51. Direct Form I IIR notch filter. apply() method: output = b0*sample + b1*x1 + b2*x2 - a1*y1 - a2*y2. Key theorems: passthrough, zero-state, delay updates. Reuses LowPassFilter2p patterns. Tractable with ring/simp.

SecondOrderReferenceModel.notes: Target 52. Forward-Euler state transition. Key theorems: reset_state, reset_rate, equilibrium fixed point. ring-provable. Used in setpoint smoothing/trajectory following.

WelfordMeanVector.notes: Target 53. Vector WelfordMean. Extends WelfordMean.lean. 2-component model. mean = sum/count invariant. Induction on update count.

PurePursuit.notes: Target 54. Lookahead distance = constrain(v*k, min, max). One theorem: lookahead_in_range via constrain_range. Trivial. Safety-critical.
